qwen3.6-35b-a3b|think.justification: Despite det score of 10, this think variant consistently misreads 1940 as 1950 for all three series start years and blue bottoms-out at 2050 instead of 2060. Yellow/pH endpoint years correct. Notably weaker than its nothink counterpart. Annotations captured well.

notes: Larger Qwen3.5/3.6 variants excel with all start years (1940) and endpoints (blue 2060, yellow 2040, pH 2070) correct and 'Domoic acid' captured verbatim. Common failure pattern: misreading 1940 as 1950 (seen in gemma4-12b/26b/31b, qwen3.5-4b-think, qwen3.6-35b-think). One critical hallucination: gemma4-12b-think invents 'Atomic acid' instead of 'Domoic acid'. Notably gemma4-e4b-think omits the entire yellow bacteria/dinoflagellate series despite a det_score of 10 — clear over-rating by deterministic scoring. The nothink variants of qwen3.6-27b and qwen3.6-35b-a3b outperformed their think counterparts, suggesting thinking sometimes amplifies the 1950 OCR error.
